headline: Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) Stock After 59% Year Gain Are Valuation Doubts Warranted
summary: If you are wondering whether Archer-Daniels-Midland stock offers fair value at current levels, the key is understanding how its market price lines up against several different valuation checks. The stock last closed at US$80.24, with returns of 35.9% year to date and 59.2% over the past year, even though it has slipped 0.8% over the last week and 0.2% over the last month. Recent coverage has focused on Archer-Daniels-Midland's role in global food supply chains and how shifts in agricultural...
